userId.description: The user id of the comment's owner

threadId.description: The id of thread the comment belongs to

comment.description: The text content of the comment (Markdown)

likeCount.description: The amount of likes the comment has

isLiked.description: If the currently authenticated user liked the comment

siteUrl.description: The url for the comment page on the AniList website

createdAt.description: The time of the comments creation

updatedAt.description: The time of the comments last update

thread.description: The thread the comment belongs to

user.description: The user who created the comment

likes.description: The users who liked the comment

isLocked.description: If the comment tree is locked and may not receive replies or edits
